==============================================================================================================
BTC GENESIS CHAIN -- PHI QUARTER-STEP CUBE GEOMETRY OF THE ENTIRE BITCOIN BLOCKCHAIN
nos3bl33d   |   x^2 = x + 1   |   2^32/phi^(k/4) quarter-step ladder
==============================================================================================================

THE CUBE
  8 SHA-256 state words = 8 vertices of a cube.
  Each vertex touches 3 edges. Each edge = 0.25 lp on the phi grid.
  Nonce (W[3]) is the CUBE DIAGONAL from merkle tail (W[0]): 3 edges = 3 quarter-steps = 0.75 lp.
  Grid: 2^32 / phi^(k/4). Genesis nonce at k=6, face 1, vertex 2.
  The answer shares a face with the merkle root.
  Mirror key: byte_reverse(n0_mirror) = n0. Verified both directions.

GENESIS CALIBRATION
  n0 = 2083236893  (0x7c2bac1d)
  n0_mirror = 497822588  (0x1dac2b7c)
  phi = 1.618033988749895
  lp(n0) = 44.589903
  k(n0) = 6  (exact: 6.014159)
  face = 1, vertex = 2
  100yr_sec / phi^0.863043 = n0 EXACTLY

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
